events.name: FC Augsburg at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich scored three times in 19 minutes in the first half to crush Hoffenheim 5-0 on Wednesday and restore their four-point advantage at the top of the standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern restore Bundesliga lead in five-goal romp

video.headline: Bayern race into a 2-0 lead vs. Hoffenheim

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayern race into a 2-0 lead vs. Hoffenheim) 2025/01/15 ESHEET
